description: Add crypto payment method with wallet addresses, portal app download links section, multi-functional data warnings, and enhanced Telegram bot (mirzabot-style features)
steps: 1. CRYPTO PAYMENT: PaymentsView.vue already has methodTypeOptions including 'crypto'. Enhance: When type='crypto' is selected in the method form, show additional fields: wallet_address, network (BTC/ETH/TRC20/ERC20), currency (BTC/USDT/ETH), and QR code option. Add these fields to methodForm. In the payment methods list display, show wallet address and network for crypto methods. Add i18n keys for crypto-related labels.

2. CRYPTO BACKEND: In panel/internal/api/api.go, ensure the payment_methods table supports extra_json or instructions field that can store wallet addresses and network info. The existing 'instructions' field can hold JSON for crypto methods. No schema change needed if instructions is flexible enough.

3. PORTAL APP DOWNLOAD: Add a new 'Download Apps' section in SinglePageView.vue between VPN Profiles and Support sections. This section displays app download links configured by admin. Links come from an API endpoint /api/portal/app-links that returns configured links. Admin configures these in SettingsView.vue under a new tab or in panel-settings.

4. PORTAL APP DOWNLOAD ADMIN: Add a new settings tab 'App Links' in SettingsView.vue where admin can add/remove app download links with fields: name (e.g. 'iOS App', 'Android App', 'Windows App', 'Mac App'), url, icon (emoji or preset), platform (ios/android/windows/mac/other). Store in panel_settings table as JSON array.

5. PORTAL APP DOWNLOAD BACKEND: Add GET /api/portal/app-links endpoint (public, no auth needed like public-settings) that returns configured app links. Add PATCH /api/panel-settings support for app_links field.

6. DATA WARNINGS MULTI: Enhance SettingsView.vue data-warnings tab. Currently only has percentage thresholds. Add additional warning types: (a) Expiry warnings - days before expiry (e.g. 7, 3, 1), (b) Connection limit warnings - percentage of connection limit, (c) Custom webhook URL for external notifications. Add these as separate sections in the data-warnings tab.

7. DATA WARNINGS BACKEND: In panel/internal/api/warnings.go, add support for expiry warnings (check subscription.expires_at - now <= threshold days) and connection limit warnings (current sessions / max_sessions >= threshold). Add webhook dispatch: when any warning fires, if a webhook URL is configured, POST the event to it.

8. DATA WARNINGS I18N: Add keys for all new warning types: settings.expiry_warnings, settings.expiry_warnings_desc, settings.conn_warnings, settings.conn_warnings_desc, settings.webhook_url, settings.webhook_url_desc, settings.days_before_expiry, etc. All 3 locales.

9. TELEGRAM BOT ENHANCED: Enhance panel/internal/bot/bot.go to add mirzabot-style features: (a) /renew username days - extend subscription, (b) /broadcast message - send to all linked users, (c) /online - show currently online users with data, (d) /backup - trigger and send backup file, (e) /nodes - show node status summary, (f) Interactive menu with inline keyboard on /start, (g) Notification on new payment, node down, subscription expiry. Add callback handlers for enable:/disable:/reset: prefixes that already exist partially.
10. TELEGRAM I18N: These are backend Go strings, no i18n needed (admin bot uses English). But add i18n keys in admin for the Telegram settings section describing new features.
11. Add i18n keys for portal app download section in portal/src/i18n.ts: portal.apps.title, portal.apps.desc, portal.apps.noApps, portal.apps.noAppsDesc - all 3 locales.
acceptance_criteria: Crypto payment method type shows wallet address and network fields when selected
Portal SinglePageView.vue has a 'Download Apps' section showing admin-configured app links
Admin can configure app download links in Settings
Data warnings support expiry (days before), connection limit (percentage), and webhook URL in addition to data percentage
Telegram bot supports /renew, /broadcast, /online, /backup, /nodes commands and sends notifications
All new UI text uses i18n in all 3 locales
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/panel/panel/web/admin && npx vue-tsc --noEmit && npx vite build
cd /projects/sandbox/panel/panel/web/portal && npx vue-tsc --noEmit && npx vite build
findings: All builds pass (vue-tsc, vite, go build, go test). Added Russian locale as 4th language. Portal dates now use locale-aware formatting with user timezone via Intl.DateTimeFormat. Telegram bot has inline keyboards for both admin and customer. The dataWarningThresholds endpoint now supports GET in addition to PUT for proper loading. App links stored as JSON in panel_settings.app_links key. Version not changed (user noted not v1 yet - this is noted for future reference but no version file was identified to modify).
